Uses of Interface
com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action

  • Packages that use Action 
    Package Description
    com.github.dakusui.actionunit  
    com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors  

    • Uses of Action in com.github.dakusui.actionunit

      Classes in com.github.dakusui.actionunit that implement Action 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  Action.Base
      A base class of all Actions.
      static class  Action.Composite
      A skeletal implementation for composite actions, such as Action.Sequential or Action.Concurrent.
      static class  Action.Concurrent
      A class that represents a set of actions that should be executed sequentially.
      static class  Action.Leaf
      Any action that actually does any meaningful operation outside "ActionUnit" framework should extend this class.
      static class  Action.RepeatIncrementally<T> 
      static class  Action.Retry 
      static class  Action.Sequential
      A class that represents a sequence of actions that should be executed one after another.
      static class  Action.TimeOut 
      static class  Action.WithTarget<T>
      A skeletal implementation for actions which are performed with a certain object of type T.
      Fields in com.github.dakusui.actionunit declared as Action 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      Action Action.Retry.action 
      Action Action.TimeOut.action

      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      Iterable<? extends Action> Action.Composite.actions 
      Methods in com.github.dakusui.actionunit that return Action 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static Action Actions.concurrent(Action... actions)
      Creates an action which runs given actions in a concurrent manner.
      static Action Actions.concurrent(String summary, Action... actions)
      Creates an action which runs given actions in a concurrent manner.
      static Action Actions.concurrent(String summary, Iterable<? extends Action> actions)
      Creates an action which runs given actions in a concurrent manner.
      Action Action.WithTarget.Factory.create(T target) 
      static Action Actions.nop()
      Returns an action that does nothing.
      static Action Actions.nop(String summary)
      Returns an action that does nothing.
      static <T> Action Actions.repeatIncrementally(Iterable<T> datasource, Action.WithTarget.Factory<T> factoryForActionWithTarget)
      Performs an action created by given factoryForActionWithTarget for each element in given datasource.
      static Action Actions.retry(Action action, int times, int interval, TimeUnit timeUnit)
      Creates an action which retries given action.
      static Action Actions.sequential(Action... actions)
      Creates an action which runs given actions in a sequential manner.
      static Action Actions.sequential(String summary, Action... actions)
      Creates an action which runs given actions in a sequential manner.
      static Action Actions.sequential(String summary, Iterable<? extends Action> actions)
      Creates an action which runs given actions in a sequential manner.
      static Action Actions.simple(Runnable runnable)
      Creates a simple action object.
      static Action Actions.simple(String summary, Runnable runnable)
      Creates a simple action object.
      static Action Actions.timeout(Action action, int duration, TimeUnit timeUnit)
      Creates an action object which times out after duration specified by given parameters.

      protected Runnable ActionRunner.toTask(Action action)
      An extension point to allow users to customize how an action will be executed by this Visitor.
